{{CargoRelic
|name=collection@20993_1
|class_id=20993
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=collection@20993_2
|fame=29
|art=14
|fth=18
|civ=16
|tech=13
|ss1=Snail Leadership +2<br>prop@58572_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss2=Snail Leadership +4<br>prop@58572_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss3=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58572_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss4=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58572_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600
|ss7=Snail Leadership +6<br>prop@58572_2<br>Lucky Star Gained: 3600/3600<br> (Awakened)
}}
